  1. org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.resource

Uses of Package
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.resource

Packages that use org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.resource
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.resource
Method callbacks and result converters for MCP resource read requests.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.resource used by org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.resource
    Class
    Description
    AbstractMcpResourceMethodCallback
    Abstract base class for creating callbacks around resource methods.
    AbstractMcpResourceMethodCallback.AbstractBuilder
    Abstract builder for creating McpResourceMethodCallback instances.
    AbstractMcpResourceMethodCallback.ContentType
    Content type of the resource.
    AsyncMcpResourceMethodCallback
    Class for creating BiFunction callbacks around resource methods with asynchronous processing.
    AsyncMcpResourceMethodCallback.Builder
    Builder for creating AsyncMcpResourceMethodCallback instances.
    AsyncStatelessMcpResourceMethodCallback
    Class for creating BiFunction callbacks around resource methods with asynchronous processing for stateless contexts.
    AsyncStatelessMcpResourceMethodCallback.Builder
    Builder for creating AsyncStatelessMcpResourceMethodCallback instances.
    McpReadResourceResultConverter
    Interface for converting method return values to McpSchema.ReadResourceResult.
    SyncMcpResourceMethodCallback
    Class for creating BiFunction callbacks around resource methods.
    SyncMcpResourceMethodCallback.Builder
    Builder for creating SyncMcpResourceMethodCallback instances.
    SyncStatelessMcpResourceMethodCallback
    Class for creating BiFunction callbacks around resource methods for stateless contexts.
    SyncStatelessMcpResourceMethodCallback.Builder
    Builder for creating SyncStatelessMcpResourceMethodCallback instances.
